mapper.select: SELECT id , bgm_file_attach_id , image_file_attach_id , bgm_name , artist , lyrics , genre_code , bgm_length , use_yn , remarks , insert_user_id , insert_dt , update_user_id , update_dt FROM bgm WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id , bgm_file_attach_id , image_file_attach_id , bgm_name , artist , lyrics , genre_code , bgm_length , use_yn , remarks , insert_user_id , insert_dt , update_user_id , update_dt FROM bgm
mapper.update: UPDATE BGM SET BGM_NAME = #{updateBgmDto.bgmName}, ARTIST = #{updateBgmDto.artist}, LYRICS = #{updateBgmDto.lyrics}, GENRE_CODE = #{updateBgmDto.genreCode}, BGM_LENGTH = #{updateBgmDto.bgmLength}, USE_YN = #{updateBgmDto.useYn}, REMARKS = #{updateBgmDto.remarks}, UPDATE_USER_ID = #{updateBgmDto.updateUserId}, UPDATE_DT = #{updateBgmDto.updateDt} WHERE BGM_ID = #{id}
